---
description: "Generate a detailed summary report of the failure analysis results, including fix log, effort savings, and iteration timeline."
agent: "failure-analysis"
---

Generate the failure analysis summary report at `SummaryReports/summary-report.md`.

Use the summary-report skill to produce a comprehensive document with:
- Results by category (UI/API pass/fail counts)
- Cross-pattern analysis of shared root causes
- Detailed fix log with reasoning
- Iteration summary with commands and durations
- Timeline and time breakdown
- Effort savings analysis (manual vs non-agentic vs agentic)
